narrative:
Cincinnati 2-I (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,236 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.6 percentage points.
